detailed_description: The video presents a compelling before-and-after comparison highlighting a significant skin transformation. It begins with a close-up of skin showing visible pores and minor imperfections, clearly labeled 'before'. This transitions seamlessly to an 'after' shot of the same person, showcasing remarkably smoother, clearer, and more radiant skin with a healthy glow. The entire sequence functions as a direct visual demonstration of an enhanced skin appearance.

segments.why_kept: This segment is kept in its entirety as it perfectly encapsulates the 'Reveal/Result' hero moment through a clear 'Before/After' comparison, which is the sole purpose and value of this short video. There is no setup, dead air, or extraneous footage to trim.
